about.title: About Shopy
about.headline: Shopping that understands what you mean
about.intro: Shopy is an AI-native store. Instead of hunting through filters, you describe what you want in plain English — and a shopping assistant, grounded in the real catalog, finds it.
about.feature1Desc: Skip endless filters. Tell the assistant what you mean and it does the searching for you.
about.feature2Desc: Every suggestion is pulled from the live catalog — no invented products, no hallucinations.
about.feature3Desc: Card payments via Stripe and cash on delivery, with clear order and payment status.
about.feature4Desc: USD base with live conversion to EUR, GBP, KWD and UZS at checkout.
about.step1Desc: Open the assistant and say what you're after — a budget, a use case, a vibe.
about.step2Desc: It asks the right follow-ups and narrows results across the live catalog.
about.step3Desc: Pick from grounded recommendations and head straight to the product or checkout.
about.faq1Q: How is this different from a normal search bar?
about.faq1A: A keyword search matches words. Shopy reads intent — it understands “lightweight jacket for rainy weather under $80” as a category, a price ceiling, and attributes, then blends vector similarity with structured filters.
about.faq2Q: Does the assistant make up products?
about.faq2A: No. Every answer is grounded in the live catalog using retrieval-augmented generation — the model only recommends products that were actually retrieved.
about.faq3Q: Do I need an account to browse?
about.faq3A: No. You can chat, search, and explore the full catalog anonymously. An account is only needed to place an order and get personalized recommendations.
about.faq4A: Card payments via Stripe Checkout, plus cash on delivery. Orders track payment status from unpaid through paid, failed, or refunded.
about.faq5Q: Which currencies can I shop in?
about.faq5A: USD is the base currency, with live conversion to EUR, GBP, KWD and UZS. Prices and order totals are shown in your chosen currency.
about.ctaDesc: Describe what you need — the assistant takes it from there.

landing.heroSubtitle: Just describe it. We’ll find it.
landing.heroDesc: Shopy is an AI-native store. Tell our assistant what you need in plain English — it asks the right questions, then recommends real products from the catalog.
landing.tryExample: Try “lightweight jacket for rainy weather under $80”

errors.pageNotFoundDesc: Looks like this page went shopping and never came back.
